mapper.select: select id, contact_name as contactName, contact_phone as contactPhone, province, city, district, detail_address as detailAddress, tag, is_default as isDefault, create_time as createTime from user_address where user_id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0 order by is_default desc, create_time desc

select id, contact_name as contactName, contact_phone as contactPhone, province, city, district, detail_address as detailAddress, tag, is_default as isDefault, create_time as createTime from user_address where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1

select id, user_id as userId, contact_name as contactName, contact_phone as contactPhone, province, city, district, detail_address as detailAddress, tag, is_default as isDefault, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from user_address where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1

select id, contact_name as contactName, contact_phone as contactPhone, province, city, district, detail_address as detailAddress, tag, is_default as isDefault, create_time as createTime from user_address where user_id = #{userId} and is_default = 1 and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into user_address ( user_id, contact_name, contact_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, tag, is_default, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{address.contactName}, #{address.contactPhone}, #{address.province}, #{address.city}, #{address.district}, #{address.detailAddress}, #{address.tag}, #{address.isDefault}, #{address.createTime}, #{address.updateTime} )
mapper.update: update user_address set contact_name = #{address.contactName}, contact_phone = #{address.contactPhone}, province = #{address.province}, city = #{address.city}, district = #{address.district}, detail_address = #{address.detailAddress}, tag = #{address.tag}, is_default = #{address.isDefault}, update_time = #{address.updateTime} where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0
update user_address set is_default = 0 where user_id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0 and is_default = 1
